title: Senior/Staff Software Engineer (Agentic)
description:
Senior / Staff Full Stack Engineer (Agentic focused) - TypeScript, React, Node

Open Source • Developer Tools • AI Infrastructure • Remote (US)

We're working with a rapidly growing startup in the open-source AI and developer tooling space, building infrastructure that helps engineers integrate intelligent systems into real-world applications.

This is a senior engineering role focused on building and deploying production AI agents and deep integrations across the AI ecosystem. This is not a research or prototype role — we are looking for engineers who have taken agentic applications into real production environments.

You'll work closely with partner engineering teams and enterprise customers to design and deploy real-world agentic systems across modern AI platforms.

What You'll Do

- Build and deploy production AI agents and agentic workflows
- Design multi-agent systems, orchestration, and memory patterns
- Develop integrations with agent frameworks and AI platforms
- Build SDKs and APIs used by developers and customers
- Work directly with partner engineering teams
- Support real-world AI deployments and POCs
- Take agentic applications from concept to production

You will regularly work across environments such as AWS, Azure, and modern AI platforms.

Required Experience

Agentic AI experience is required.

Strong candidates will have:

- Experience building AI agents or agentic applications
- Experience deploying AI systems into production
- Experience with agent frameworks (LangChain, LangGraph, ADK, Semantic Kernel, or similar)
- Strong backend or full-stack engineering skills
- Experience integrating APIs and external platforms
- Experience working with LLM APIs
- 5+ years of software engineering experience

Ideal Background

The strongest candidates typically have:

- Built multi-agent production systems
- Experience with hyperscaler AI platforms (AWS, Azure, or Google)
- Experience building integrations or SDKs
- Open-source experience
- Startup experience
- Strong communication skills

Logistics

Remote (U.S)

We are specifically looking for engineers who know how to build, deploy, and scale AI agents in real-world environments and have a background working in the open source space.

Featured benefits: Vision insurance, Dental insurance, Medical insurance, 401(k)

Requirements: Authorized to work in the United States. No need for visa sponsorship.
